entry.title: Re: CDS Views: return most recent record
entry.content:
This type of thing?

Delete duplicate entries in ABAP CDS views using T... - SAP Community

entry.title: SAP & AGILITA Workshop on SAP Build: what a great experience!
entry.content:
At the end of last week I had a very stimulating trip to Berlin, where I participated in the SAP & AGILITA Workshop on SAP Build. It was an interesting event and I'm happy to share my takeaways with you.

Thursday November 27, 8:30 AM: I join my colleagues who arrived from Walldorf and Helsinki for a breakfast at our hotel, and we quickly head up to SAP Berlin office. Once there, together with the Berlin colleagues, we set up the event rooms we had booked for the keynote and then the hands-on workshop.

At 10.30, attendees start to arrive: we have the pleasure to welcome business users and developers from Berliner Verkehrsbetriebe (BVG), Bundesdruckerei, Stiftung Das Rauhe Haus, Hochschule für Technik und Wirtschaft Berlin as well as partners and a few SAP employees. All together, we engage discussions over a buffet of snacks before the event kicks off at 11.00 with our keynote, joined by many attendees on LinkedIn live and moderated by Esmeé.

Keynote and solution deep dive

Diana Roesner starts the keynote by introducing the Clean Core concept and explaining how SAP Build can be used to easily create side-by-side extensions to an SAP application. On this very important topic, I highly recommend you a new white paper - “Clean core extensibility for SAP S/4HANA Cloud” - and a crisp and easy-to consume learning journey - “Practicing Clean Core Extensibility For SAP S/4HANA Cloud”.

We then dive into the different components of the SAP Build solution, with my close colleagues Kanishka presenting SAP Build Process Automation and SAP Build Code, and Yumnah describing SAP Build Apps and SAP Build Work Zone. Jesse gives a great demo of how SAP Build can help 🎅🏻 Santa Company 🎄 streamline order approvals by creating an extension directly from his SAP S/4HANA ERP using our Extensibility Wizard. Finally Hemant provides an insightful perspective on how SAP Build supports line-of-businesses, including finance, procurement, supply chain, customer experience, human resources, IT and cross-functional:

Following the presentations, our experts held a Q&A session with the audience, answering the questions raised on-site as well as in the online chat:

We received very positive feedback from the audience on this session, which you can watch as a replay.

You can also download the slides of this keynote.

Hands-on Workshop

After a short break, we moved to another room for the hands-on workshop. In 3 hours, our local participants had the opportunity to create a full-stack application to improve customer loyalty. The purpose of the application is to allow customers to redeem points from their purchases. To do this, the application needs to access customer, purchase and product data from SAP S/4HANA.

Specifically, workshop participants experienced using SAP Build Code to create a back-end CAP service with Joule AI copilot, highlighting SAP's generative AI power for development. The customer loyalty application is connected to SAP S/4HANA Cloud as an extension to the ERP, so the participants learned how to use a BTP destination. And they used SAP Build Apps to create a mobile app, showcasing our modern low-code/no-code development tool.

This is the part of the event I was involved in, and I have to say it was great and rewarding to see our participants amazed at how Joule helped them create data entities, sample data and JavaScript code from simple prompts.  They really experienced the power of Generative AI that we showcased at SAP TechEd a few weeks ago!

If you would like to do this hands-on exercise and experience Joule by yourself, it’s very easy!

Indeed, it is available here in our Basic Trial environment, where you will have immediate access to all the tools needed: SAP Build Code - Generative AI-powered development with Joule copilot.

Christmas Market at AGILITA’s

At 16:00 we jumped into a bus who drove us to the AGILITA office in Berlin. There, AGILITA Christmas Market brought everyone together to reflect and share ideas in a festive atmosphere.

Thomas Neuhaus, Head of Digital Experience for AGILITA, presented SAP AppHaus Workshops: SAP and AGILITA are helping customers find the right path to digitalization with design and architecture thinking workshops. Customers discover how to integrate Al and innovation for their own use cases, and how to effectively improve their business processes.

We also had the opportunity to attend very interesting demos of applications developed by the AGILITA team with SAP Build, showing how tasks like recording time or logging work can happen in just 3 clicks:  

AGIL AI.TimeManager  - Optimize your time and activity recording with AGIL Time Manager, the flexible and user- friendly solution for efficient time management and seamless integration in real-time.
➡️ More on AGIL AI.TimeManager in SAP Store.

 

AGIL Al.Sales  - Boost sales performance with the power of voice and Al synergy. Effortlessly dictate orders and meeting notes while on the go - advanced generative Al transcribes, analyzes, and seamlessly updates your systems in real time.
➡️ More on AGIL AI.Sales in SAP Store.

 Discover more AGILITA’s applications and extensions in SAP Store.

Up to you now!

You too can take advantage of the content we have prepared for this event. And it's very simple!

  1. Watch the keynote replay 🎞  ️
  2. Download the presentation 👍🏻  
  3. Do the hands-on exercise 👩🏻‍🎓👨🏻‍🎓

 

Personal note

To end this blog post on a more personal note, I would like to say that I had 2 very energizing days in Berlin. I only work 3 days a week, Monday-Wednesday, but when I was asked if I could attend this event in Berlin on a Thursday, I didn't hesitate for a second: as I work 100% from home in Lyon, it was a great opportunity to meet up with colleagues from Berlin and Walldorf. The day after the event, we took time to reflect on what we did in 2024 and what we would like to do in 2025. This trip to Berlin was also a nice opportunity to meet great people from our valued partner AGILITA.

And when I was on my way back to Lyon on Friday evening, what caught my eye in the Berlin airport terminal?

On a big screen, an ad from SAP promoting our magical trifecta of Process + Data + AI 😊

entry.title: Enumerations and typed dimensions in SAP DM stack 2200
entry.content:
Dear SAP experts,

In SAP Disclosure Management stack 2200 is now possible to manage enumerations and typed dimensions according to ESRS regulation. It is quite easy to understand how to manage in SAP DM, but I would like to know if there is any how to or manual to understand how to build the taxonomy in Taxonomy Editor. I try to replicate the sample taxonomy in the EFRAG website(https://www.efrag.org/en/projects/esrs-xbrl-taxonomy/concluded) but I cannot be able to unlock enumerations and typed dimensions in SAP DM:

and

Thanks in advance.

Regards,

Andrea Migliore

entry.title: Re: Budget Controlling Not working in Recurring Journal E...
entry.content:
Hi Phoo,

In CBC configuration -  Maintain Budget Availability Control Profile for Cost Centers, please check your cost center budget profile. Ensure that in the budget profile, Account Groups node, all your GL accounts listed in Recurring Entry Temlatea are also maintained in the account group for your Budget Profile.

Also ensure in tye Tolerance Limit node, please select " All Activity Types" in the same configuration. This should resolve the issue.

entry.title: Re: How to mass upload batch derivation condition records in S/4 Public cloud
entry.content: I am facing same, It will be helpful if somebody can share their knowledge here regarding same

entry.title: AL11 pathway source
entry.content:
Apart from debugging, from a posted invoice,is there another way from tables how can we figure out the AL11 pathway for the path of the invoices processed?

Thank you in advance for your comments,

Regards

G.Tatayah

entry.title: Re: SF - How to consider several time entries individuall...
entry.content: Hi Volker - Thank you very much for your input and time. Very much appreciated! We will work with the suggested workaround.

entry.title: Re: EPMDimensionOverrideRange
entry.content: The first issue is you are attempting to reference the table rather than the column 2 which contains the BAS(*) - I tried this and it crashed. The second problem seems to be that EPMDimensionOverrideRange requires a rang, not table. Change the first parameter to G2:G3 and it should work (also technically the second parameter is supposed to be a range rather than PROFITCENTRE - but it does work both ways)

entry.title: Creation Custom references in Subscription item via Badi from Solution Order
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We are trying to implement the CRMS4_SOLO_ORC_SB_SUBSC_MODIFY to create 2 custom references on subscription item level when the subscription is created from a Solution order.

One of the helping sources we used is this blog : https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/solution-order-subscription-badi-extensibility/bc-p/13954073#M177429. 

In Subscription Billing I created reference types Customer_group_2 and Customer_group_3.
The values for these custom references should be read from a CDS view available in S4 (so not from a custom field in the solution order as in the example described in the blog).

In attachment, you can see a screenshot of our code.

The issue we have is that with this code, the badi creates the custom references on subscription header level, and not on item level as we want.
We're not sure what's wrong since our code is quite similar to the one shown in the blog under sentence "In the following screenshot, you can see how to fill the data using the BAdI for the subscription item custom references field. "
We also tried to modify the path in line "INTO TABLE" to select the correct "subscrpnbillgcstmref" under "ITEMS" but this seems to not be possible as the system expects an object after subscrpnbillgsubscription_out - this would mean that we have to create an new object that would lead to the custom reference on item level.

This step is not described for similar scenarios in the blog nor in other sources on the topic so we're wondering if our assumption of creating the object is correct of it there is a better way / different code we should use.

Can you please advise ?

Thank you very much in advance.

entry.title: Re: How to use company currency for supplement budget pro...
entry.content:
Hi May,

In your configuration please check in-  Maintain Budget Availability Control Profile for Projects.

Check your budget profile, what is the currency type that is maintained. If THB is your controllong currency then please maintain Global Currency in the configuraton for your Budget Profile.

entry.title: Re: Adopting General Display Name
entry.content:
Hi @HarveyXu ,

I am getting back to the following reply of yours:

"If not enable EC and you use OData API, general display name is exposed in User OData API as displayName. You can refer to https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_SUCCESSFACTORS_PLATFORM/d599f15995d348a1b45ba5603e2aba9b/e13d5de2c3844... for detail. "

I agree that the displayName is exposed in the OData API, but the point is, that the standard integration between SAP HCM and SF does not consider it and does not offer it as part of the standard fields of the integration. My expectation would be that SAP delivers an enhancement to this integration and includes the displayName or an enhancement that triggers the calculation of the displayName when user records are updated via API.

Thanks and regards
Sebastian

entry.title: Re: HANA Partitioning - 2 billion rows limitation - Part I: BWoH / BW/4HANA
entry.content:
Hello,

could you please indicate your source for the following information? 
"InfoObjects tables (sap.bw.iobj) are not partitioned, except for InfoObjects with high cardinality. Those tables are HASH partitioned on first level. All other InfoObject tables are not partitioned i.e. they do not have a partitioning specification. InfoObject tables are located on the master node."

Thank you,
Colm

entry.title: Re: How to check Table "T030" and "TTYPVX" in S4HC
entry.content:
Hi 

In the public cloud ther is no table view report, but you can ckeck via configuration "Automatic Account Determination" in this node please select in Area : "Sourcing and procurement"(OBYC)

entry.title: Re: Adding the Logo in the SAP BTP Adobe Form in S/4 public cloud
entry.content: can i get the details process to get the form to develop in btp

entry.title: Strengthening the SAP Talent Pipeline: How SAP Partners and Academia Can Connect
entry.content:
In the rapidly changing world of technology and digital transformation, maintaining a skilled workforce is crucial. SAP partners rely on talented, well-prepared consultants to implement and optimize SAP solutions for their clients. SAP University Alliances (UA), a global academic initiative of SAP, plays a key role in nurturing this talent pipeline within the SAP ecosystem.

To raise awareness among SAP partners about the potential of SAP University Alliances, SAP offers a strategic way to shape their candidate pool. SAP partners can now collaborate with over 2,700 universities worldwide through the UA global network. This opportunity is explicitly listed in on one of the main tools for partners – the SAP Partner Benefits Catalog (link accessible only by authorised SAP partners), which serves as a guide for go-to-market (GTM) strategies and helps partners engage with and grow within the SAP ecosystem.

Benefits of Partnering with SAP University Alliances

By partnering with SAP University Alliances, service partners can tap into a global network of academic institutions, allowing them to recruit interns who are both enthusiastic and well-prepared for SAP consulting roles. This collaboration helps guide students from UA-member schools into SAP consulting careers, ensuring a steady pipeline of talent for SAP partners.

The benefits are mutual:

  • Interns gain real-world SAP experience, professional training and certifications, giving them a competitive edge in the job market.
  • SAP Partners onboard interns who are already equipped with foundational SAP skills, enhancing their ability to contribute to current and future projects.

Collaboration Opportunities with SAP University Alliances

The SAP Partner Benefits Catalog (PBC) outlines various ways partners can engage with SAP University Alliances member schools in the section “Connect with young talents through SAP University Alliances”, the listed in PBC options include:

  • Networking opportunities: Join designated signature events of SAP University Alliances to matchmake with academic community and relevant institutions in your region
  • Guest Lectures: Deliver guest lectures to directly interact with talented students.
  • Internships: Offer internships to high-achieving students and gain access to emerging talent.
  • Sponsoring Technical Teaching Infrastructure: Increase brand awareness by covering fees for SAP systems used in academic teaching or setting up learning environments for universities leveraging a system infrastructure of your choice.
  • Site Visits: Invite students and lecturers to visit your facilities to showcase your work environment and corporate culture.

To learn more about collaborating with academic institutions, please refer to the SAP Partner Benefits Catalog.

Highlighting the Student Internships Sponsor Plan

One standout initiative in the SAP Partner Benefits Catalog is the Student Internships Sponsor Plan (link accessible only by authorised SAP partners) which focuses on nurturing a talent pipeline and supporting students early in their careers. As part of this program, SAP offers reimbursement to partners for SAP Learning Hub, Partner Edition subscriptions, provided their interns complete at least one certification during their internship.

This initiative aligns with SAP’s goal of helping interns launch their careers in SAP consulting, while also positioning SAP partners as attractive employers. By offering comprehensive learning resources and certification opportunities, SAP empowers interns and junior consultants with skills that are directly applicable to SAP projects. At the same time, SAP partners benefit from being seen as forward-thinking companies committed to the development of the next generation of SAP professionals.

For more information on how your organization can participate in this program and apply for reimbursement, please refer to the SAP Partner Benefits Catalog.

Using the SAP Partner Finder for Effective Collaborations

While the SAP Partner Benefits Catalog offers a streamlined way for partners to connect with universities, there is an additional tool available to help faculty members and students find and engage with SAP partners: the SAP Partner Finder . This tool allows those interested to independently identify SAP partners within their region and industry sectors of relevance. By proactively reaching out to these partners, one can strengthen students' career prospects and deepen SAP-related learning at their institutions. Direct partnerships with local SAP partners provide students with valuable real-world insights and hands-on experiences, helping them build the connections and skills needed for future SAP consulting roles.

Building a Future Together

At SAP, we believe that fostering a culture of learning, collaboration, and growth within the SAP ecosystem is essential for ensuring a future led by highly trained professionals. By leveraging resources like the SAP Partner Benefits Catalog and the SAP Partner Finder, universities and SAP partners can work together to create meaningful opportunities for students. These partnerships not only prepare students for successful careers in SAP consulting but also provide SAP partners with a skilled, ready-to-work talent pool. Together, universities, students, and SAP partners are building a strong foundation for the future of the industry.

Learn more about SAP University Alliances: SAP University Alliances | SAP Next Gen Community.

entry.title: Purchase Order Item Notes field
entry.content: Is there any CDS Views which include these Purchase Order Item Note fields?

entry.title: Re: Why is Hungarian Notation Harmful?
entry.content:
tables:
lt_ - local variable table
mt_ - class member variable table
gt_ - global variable table

simple type variables:
lv_ - local variable 
mv_ - class member variable
gv_ - global variable

Ability to distinguish local, class member and global variables is an important one, at least for me.
Although i try to use as little as possible global variables..

entry.title: Re: Condition not considered (Requirement 0000055 not ful...
entry.content:
Typically, this condittion is used for items, which are set to free-of-charge for the customer by the item category. Condition 55 is checking a parameter in the item category. 

Do you use a different item category in this case compared to the material case, where it is working fine?

entry.title: Re: SAP B1 TB report BP display filtered by GL Accounts
entry.content: Hello, I believe that you are not describing SAP Business One functionality. This functions are not in SAP Business one

entry.title: Re: How to use company currency for supplement budget pro...
entry.content:
Hi @venu-reddy ,

You mean configuration "Budget Currency Type" to Global currency right?

Thanks,

May

entry.title: Re: An error occurred while communicating with the OData...
entry.content:
Hello, Specialist

When accessing, this message is returned for both connectors of the mobile service.

Access denied to resource /sap/opu/odata/MERP/SAP_ONLINE_LOOKUP_EXT_2205 on system xxxx. In case this was a valid request, ensure to expose the resource correctly in your cloud connector.

However, when testing the connection via /IWFND/SUTIL_GW_CLIENT (SAP Gateway), it returns a 200 status for this connection as shown in the image.

Performing a test by using the address with the back-end connector, it returns this error.

Thank you in advance!

entry.title: Re: Converting / Printing Subscript and Superscript (from Your Data) in Crystal Reports
entry.content:
Dear sir,

how to print symbol ≤ in crystal report. in oracle databse its saving like <u><</u> for less than or equal to and <u>></u> for greater than or equal to. please let me know a solution.

eg1.in database data is saving; <u><</u>CFU/g. i need it in print ≤CFU/g.

eg2. <u><</u><sup>10</sup> CFU/g. i need it in print ≤10² CFU/g.

superscript and subscript am managing to print with formulas.

regards,

Sajeesh

entry.title: Re: Some employees are not being synced to IAS/IPS from S...
entry.content: This KBA has helped us resolve the issue: 3415692 - Could not connect to target host https://<IAS_tenantID>.accounts.ondemand.com Caused by: Connection reset by peer - SAP for Me

entry.title: Re: roles for user in SU01 for to send email
entry.content:
Hello,

You need to assign email send authorizations.

The authorization object S_OC_SEND and (as values) the permitted communication methods and the maximum number of recipients to which a user may address a message are assigned to you. The authorizations required for sending are, by default, contained in the role SAP_BC_SRV_USER for the end user of the Business Workplace.

https://help.sap.com/docs/ABAP_PLATFORM_NEW/026f8a31bca948a086e995ce267f4e38/4a25a37c08a81c67e10000000a42189c.html

entry.title: Re: ABAP Clean Core for Unreleased Function Module
entry.content: I don't understand the question?! The ticket is returned by the above ICF service, and System ID, User ID and Client should be known, *before* you even log in!??

entry.title: Re: SAP & AGILITA Workshop on SAP Build: what a great experience!
entry.content: It was an honor to be part of this event and meet everyone there! Already looking forward to the next! 😊🎄

entry.title: Production Connector -- Dispatch Message Error - Exception during the start of the destination
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

at the moment we are facing a problem where we cannot make any progress with the given logs and error messages.

Any hint as to whether it is a certificate problem, a Cloud Connector problem or whether there are additional ways of isolating the error will help us.

Process setup

OPC-UA as a shopfloor system sends an indicator to the DM.
In the DM there is an Automatic Trigger Subscription with an assigned PPD, which waits for changes to the indicator.
When the indicator is changed in the OPC server, the subscription is already called and stored as a message in the correct agent instance of the Production Connector.
However, the agent instance then has a problem when calling the PPD towards the DM.

  • The connections in “Configure Production Connectivity” are already maintained and have the status running
  • We double checked the BTP Destination SAP_DMC_DEFAULT_SERVICE_KEY
  • We worked through Troubleshooting - Configure Production Connectivity App | SAP Help Portal
  • We have looked at the Production Connector logs (no further indications of a connection error, only information entries)

 

Our current state of knowledge

Certificate from the Production Connector in the DM compared to the automatically generated client proxy to the PPD

User Settings in Production Connector Config

Message in the agent instance from the subscription that cannot be sent to the PPD destination.



Best regards

entry.title: Industry Sector field in Product Master in S4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello Team,

I need to replicate Product master data from S4HANA Private Cloud to S4HANA Public Cloud. I found an API for this, but I'm having trouble with the "Industry" field. In the Private Cloud, this field is in the MARA table (T137), but it's not in the Manage Product Master Fiori app (F1602) in the Public Cloud. The API includes the field, but I can't find a way to manage it in the Public Cloud.

Is this intentional, or am I missing something? This is important because if the industry values differ or if the Public Cloud expects a blank value, the replication will fail.

entry.title: While posting the FWSD, I am getting "Sold to Party missing in Table KNVV".
Re: Sample Code
entry.content:
I don't want to be the "google-ing" helps guy but it really helps 😉
google -> "connection to Hana Database c#" -> How to connect SAP Hana database using C#  -> 
Creating a C# Application Using SAP HANA and ADO.NET

Hope it helps!

entry.title: Re: Sample Code
entry.content:
I don't want to be the "google-ing helps" guy, but it really helps 😉

google -> "create connection to Hana Database c#" -> How to connect SAP Hana database using C#  ->
Creating a C# Application Using SAP HANA and ADO.NET

Hope it helps!

entry.title: Adding Rows to Recognized Costs and Revenues in Sales Order Items via PDI
entry.content:
Hi,

I am working on adding rows to the Recognized Costs and Revenues section of Sales Order items. I have identified the relevant Business Object (BO) and Item node, but it seems there is no Create function available in the node.

Has anyone successfully added rows to this screen using PDI? If so, could you share your approach or any insights?

Thank you in advance for your help!

entry.title: Re: Sample Code
entry.content: omg...i refreshed the page like 3x and it still did not appear. hence my double post. apologies, sry!

entry.title: Synch local dimension members between models
entry.content:
Hi experts,

for each planning model I´ve a parallel backup model. Data actions are backing up data from the planning model to the backup model. This works as long as local dimension members are synched between both models. If not, data is not copied.

Now I´m searching for a generic solution how to replicate local dimension members from a planning model to the corresponding backup model.

My ideas:

a) Export job for dimension -> functionality not existing

b) Transport network -> not possible to import dimension data to a new local dimension

c) Create subscription on planning model -> Can only see option to read booked dimension members based on fact data, means it´s not a generic solution. Versions and measures might be added later to the model, but replication of local members should still work without a change. Or is there another solution with subscription / data export API / data import API?

d) API Scripting in a story: Haven´t checked this until now. However, if it´s possible how could it be executed scheduled within SAC?

Does anybody see a (generic) solution to replicate local dimension members between planning models?

BR Thomas

entry.title: Re: How to configuration Certificate use SSL Web Dispatch...
entry.content:
Hello, EunSeok

Thank you for your answer,

1. Now I don't know where to gen key request SSL from keytool.exe which is the certificate of the web dispatcher 
1.1 C:\Program Files\SAP\SAP Business One SetupFiles\sapmachine_17\bin\keytool.exe
1.2 C:\Program Files\SAP\SAP Business One Integration\sapjre_64\bin
1.3 C:\Program Files\SAP\SAP Business One BAS GateKeeper\sapmachine\bin

2. How do I import the certificate after generating a new key from keytool.exe and getting Certificate .cer?

3. Do I need to edit any file to call SSL? Please provide the steps that can be followed without having to search for them by trial and error. Follow Step 1 > 2 > and it's done.

Regards,
Worapong

entry.title: Re: How to configuration Certificate use SSL Web Dispatch...
entry.content:
Hello, EunSeok

I need a step-by-step guide, for example, similar to: Integration Framework for SAP Business One Setup of Secured Connection to SAP Business One Mobile
App https://help.sap.com/doc/16e0a7310eae4dc4808607a1fa38a6a3/9.0/en-US/Setup_Secured_Connectivity_to_SAP_Business_One_Mobile_App.pdf

That tells you every step

Regards,
Worapong

entry.title: Re: CTX Tag to show the Amount in words.
entry.content: aaaa

entry.title: Re: How to refresh the token for a OAuth 2.0 Client via R...
Re: How to refresh the token for a OAuth 2.0 Client via Resource Owner Password Credentials
entry.content: Hi @jnmeme , no solution yet, I plan to take another run at this in Q1 2025. For now, we are living with going to OA2C_CONFIG every day to perform the refresh from the UI.

entry.title: Fiori and ADFS did only work with a refresh F5 button in the Browser
entry.content:
we are using a public URL to Access the Fiori that is behind a Load Balancer and Webdisptacher (provided from SAP RISE). This is only the Problem on the sandbox and Quality System. Production works directly without refresh.

Is there any Parameter that can be optimized ?

entry.title: Re: EPMDimensionOverrideRange
entry.content:
No I'm referencing the specific column within the table not just the table. Red is the table name, Green is the table column.

=EPMDimensionOverrideRange("000","PROFITCENTRE",Table1[Manual Dimension Override List for Range])

I've tried changing this to be non tabular ranges 

=EPMDimensionOverrideRange("000","PROFITCENTRE",G2:G3)

The outcome is still the same, it just hangs forever on the same screen

Also tried putting the dimension name in cell ranges too just to check it's not that and it's the same outcome

=EPMDimensionOverrideRange("000",$H$2:$H$3,$G$2:$G$3)

entry.title: SEM BCS - document ( in PL20) not displayed show up in the List of total records
entry.content:
Hi,

We have an issue, after copy our production system to the testing system,

and some documents ( in PL20) not displayed in the List of total records.

We can see those document througj the document list.

 

 

Thanks, 

Eran

entry.title: Re: SAP B1 TB report BP display filtered by GL Accounts
entry.content:
Did you check under: Trial Balance - Selection Criteria - Expanded

(source 2950782 - Troubleshooting - Trial Balance Issues )

entry.title: Partial Leave Cancellation in SuccessFactors
entry.content:
Hi Community,

I hope you're doing well. One of my customers has the following request: An employee applied for a 5-day leave, which was approved by the relevant approvers. However, the employee now wants to cancel 2 days of the approved leave, effectively making it a 3-day leave instead.

Could you please confirm if it's possible to cancel a portion of the leave in SuccessFactors? If so, could you kindly guide me on how to proceed with this request?

Looking forward to your assistance.

entry.title: Re: EPMDimensionOverrideRange
entry.content:
OK got it working even with table ranges but seems your range can't contain formulas.

To illustrate. Referencing the yellow cells which are a formula combing text and cell contents to add the BAS(*) causes excel to crash 

Yellow override - =EPMDimensionOverrideRange("000","PROFITCENTRE",Table1[Manual Dimension Override List for Range])

Yellow cell ref range = formula to add BAS(*) to the member entered in the first column "="BAS("&[@[Manual Dimension Override list]]&")""

 

Blue ticked override - "=EPMDimensionOverrideRange("000","PROFITCENTRE",Table1[Manual Dimension Override List for Range HardTyped])"

Blue ticked cell ref range = Hard typed "BAS(P1636400)" etc

Seems a shame as it means I'll have to instruct the end users to enter the member with BAS(*) wrapped around it. Would be far simpler to allow them to enter the member that they recognise and then for me to add the right text in another cell and then to ref that cell in the dimension override

entry.title: Expired Scheduling agreement sent to the supplier
entry.content:
Hi all,

I am facing one of the issue i.e. Expired Scheduling agreement containing with future delivery schedule lines (beyond the validity date period) sent to the supplier when i perform release in ME84. And also, even though there are schedule lines of past date and there are no future delivery schedule lines then also being sent to the supplier. Please help for me.

entry.title: Re: Synch local dimension members between models
entry.content:
I´m now evaluating this:

  1. Create dedicated version "LocalDim"
  2. Data Action to create facts in this version with local dimensions booked
  3. Export data
  4. Import data

I´ll let you know. Any other solutions appreciated.

entry.title: Re: Use Chart Trellis in SAP Analytics Cloud Story
entry.content:
Hello,

unfortunately the video is still not working.

entry.title: i have upgraded hybris version from 2011 to 2205.30 and facing issues with backoffice broken
entry.content: i have upgraded hybris version from 2011 to 2205.30 and facing issues with backoffice broken and not sure how to resolve this ?

entry.title: Re: Cannot create a single file installer in SAP Installa...
entry.content: From what I can see, this file is a standalone installer that needs to be installed separately.

entry.title: Re: How many times has the output been printed?
entry.content:
Hello,

A spool creates an entry in table TSP01 and when an output request(print) is created there is an entry in table TSP02. If the spool is printed more then once there will be additional entries created in table TSP02. As below spool number 193 was printed twice and these two entries are created in table TSP02.

TSP02:
PJIDENT PJNUMMER
193 1
193 2

But when spools are deleted, the entries in table TSP01 and TSP02 are deleted.

There is a Customer Enhancement for Spool Accounting available as per the SAP Help Portal URL below

https://help.sap.com/doc/saphelp_crm700_ehp01/7.0.1.15/en-US/e0/989de87a6111d39a1d0000e83dd9fc/frameset.htm 
Customer Enhancement for Spool Accounting

Perhaps you could implement this.

Regards,
Aidan

entry.title: Graphic colors get distored after trying to remove grey background and converting to BMP
entry.content:
Hello,

I have this image with a white background, and it has shadows. Here is a small part of it to give you an idea and still keep the clients privacy:

It is a png image (though I also have it in BMP). When I, after converting it to BMP in paint, upload it in SAP in SE78, it gets a grey background.
I have found several possible solutions for this:

I used GIMP to add an alpha layer, added a white background, then exported it as 24 BMP. It still gets the grey background then.
And I tried opening that in paint, saving it as 256 BMP, but then the colors get super distorted, like this:

 

 instead of the colors smoothly transitioning from one to the other. 

I tried removing the white in GIMP but that also didnt really work (mostly, probably, because GIMP is new to me and when I removed the white, the image became really vague and whitened. 

Does anyone know what I could do to fix this, or where to look?
Thank you so much in advance.

Kind regards,
Romy

entry.title: How to Consume a class as and API or Consume it as an cds view
entry.content:
Hi All,
I have created a class in Eclipse ADT (ABAP CLoud Project )
1.created a CDS View Consuming the cds view Created a Class where i added all Logics 
2. Created a Entity defining the Class 
3. Created Service Binding and Definition defining reference to the entity
3. On Fiori preview i am unable to see data but the fields i can  

Class Code 

CLASS zstockcard DEFINITION PUBLIC CREATE PUBLIC.

 

PUBLIC SECTION.

* INTERFACES if_oo_adt_classrun.

INTERFACES if_rap_query_provider.

 

DATA:lv_mandt TYPE sy-mandt,

out TYPE REF TO if_oo_adt_classrun_out.

 

TYPES: BEGIN OF ty_material_data,

material TYPE zstockcardcdsview-material,

plant TYPE zstockcardcdsview-plant,

postingdate TYPE zstockcardcdsview-postingdate,

quantity_in_base TYPE zstockcardcdsview-quantityinbaseunit,

stockquantity TYPE zstockcardcdsview-matlwrhsstkqtyinmatlbaseunit,

unitprice TYPE zstockcardcdsview-unitprice,

currentdate TYPE zstockcardcdsview-currentdate,

END OF ty_material_data.

 

TYPES: BEGIN OF ty_material_data1,

material TYPE zstockcardcdsview-material,

plant TYPE zstockcardcdsview-plant,

quantity_in_base TYPE zstockcardcdsview-quantityinbaseunit,

stockquantity TYPE string,

END OF ty_material_data1.

 

TYPES: BEGIN OF ty_90_days,

material TYPE zstockcardcdsview-material,

plant TYPE zstockcardcdsview-plant,

unitprice TYPE zstockcardcdsview-unitprice,

quantity_in_base TYPE zstockcardcdsview-quantityinbaseunit,

END OF ty_90_days.

 

TYPES: BEGIN OF ty_180_days,

material TYPE zstockcardcdsview-material,

plant TYPE zstockcardcdsview-plant,

unitprice TYPE zstockcardcdsview-unitprice,

quantity_in_base TYPE zstockcardcdsview-quantityinbaseunit,

END OF ty_180_days.

 

TYPES: BEGIN OF ty_above180_days,

material TYPE zstockcardcdsview-material,

plant TYPE zstockcardcdsview-plant,

unitprice TYPE zstockcardcdsview-unitprice,

quantity_in_base TYPE zstockcardcdsview-quantityinbaseunit,

END OF ty_above180_days.

 

TYPES: BEGIN OF ty_output_data,

stockquantity TYPE string,

unitprice TYPE string,

plant TYPE werks_d,

material TYPE matnr,

qty_0to90days TYPE string,

value_0to90days TYPE string,

qty_90to180days TYPE string,

value_90to180days TYPE string,

qty_above180days TYPE string,

value_above180days TYPE string,

END OF ty_output_data.

.

DATA: lt_90days TYPE TABLE OF ty_90_days,

lt_180days TYPE TABLE OF ty_180_days,

lt_above180 TYPE TABLE OF ty_above180_days,

lt_stddata TYPE TABLE OF ty_material_data,

ls_stddata TYPE ty_material_data,

lt_stkstd TYPE TABLE OF ty_material_data1,

ls_stkstd TYPE ty_material_data1,

lt_output TYPE TABLE OF ty_output_data,

ls_output TYPE ty_output_data,

lv_days_diff TYPE int4,

lv_qty_left TYPE zstockcardcdsview-matlwrhsstkqtyinmatlbaseunit,

lv_index TYPE string.

 

ENDCLASS.

 

CLASS zstockcard IMPLEMENTATION.

 

 

METHOD if_rap_query_provider~select.

"in Local testing Method if_oo_adt_classrun~main.

 

 

SELECT material,

plant,

postingdate,

quantityinbaseunit,

matlwrhsstkqtyinmatlbaseunit,

unitprice,

currentdate

FROM zstockcardcdsview

INTO TABLE @lt_stddata UP TO 10000 ROWS.

 

TRY.

CASE io_request->get_entity_id( ).

WHEN 'ZStockAgeEntity'.

IF io_request->is_data_requested( ).

DATA(lv_offset) = io_request->get_paging( )->get_offset( ).

DATA(lv_page_size) = io_request->get_paging( )->get_page_size( ).

DATA(lv_max_rows) = COND #(

WHEN lv_page_size = if_rap_query_paging=>page_size_unlimited THEN 0

ELSE lv_page_size

).

 

 

" Categorize data into lt_90days, lt_180days, and lt_above180

LOOP AT lt_stddata INTO ls_stddata.

 

lv_days_diff = ls_stddata-currentdate - ls_stddata-postingdate.

 

IF lv_days_diff BETWEEN 0 AND 90.

READ TABLE lt_90days INTO DATA(ls_90days) WITH KEY material = ls_stddata-material plant = ls_stddata-plant.

lv_index = sy-tabix.

IF sy-subrc = 0.

ls_90days-quantity_in_base = ls_90days-quantity_in_base + ls_stddata-quantity_in_base.

MODIFY lt_90days FROM ls_90days INDEX lv_index.

ELSE.

MOVE-CORRESPONDING ls_stddata TO ls_90days.

INSERT ls_90days INTO TABLE lt_90days.

ENDIF.

 

ELSEIF lv_days_diff BETWEEN 91 AND 180.

READ TABLE lt_180days INTO DATA(ls_180days) WITH KEY material = ls_stddata-material plant = ls_stddata-plant.

lv_index = sy-tabix.

IF sy-subrc = 0.

ls_180days-quantity_in_base = ls_180days-quantity_in_base + ls_stddata-quantity_in_base.

MODIFY lt_180days FROM ls_180days INDEX lv_index.

ELSE.

MOVE-CORRESPONDING ls_stddata TO ls_180days.

INSERT ls_180days INTO TABLE lt_180days.

ENDIF.

 

ELSE.

READ TABLE lt_above180 INTO DATA(ls_above180) WITH KEY material = ls_stddata-material plant = ls_stddata-plant.

lv_index = sy-tabix.

IF sy-subrc = 0.

ls_above180-quantity_in_base = ls_above180-quantity_in_base + ls_stddata-quantity_in_base.

MODIFY lt_above180 FROM ls_above180 INDEX lv_index.

ELSE.

MOVE-CORRESPONDING ls_stddata TO ls_above180.

INSERT ls_above180 INTO TABLE lt_above180.

ENDIF.

 

ENDIF.

CLEAR:ls_stddata,ls_90days,ls_180days,ls_above180,lv_index.

ENDLOOP.

 

LOOP AT lt_stddata INTO ls_stddata.

MOVE-CORRESPONDING ls_stddata TO ls_stkstd.

COLLECT ls_stkstd INTO lt_stkstd.

ENDLOOP.

* MOVE-CORRESPONDING lt_stddata to lt_stkstd.

 

LOOP AT lt_stkstd INTO ls_stkstd.

CLEAR: ls_output, lv_qty_left.

 

" Initialize remaining quantity to process

lv_qty_left = ls_stkstd-stockquantity.

 

" Process 0 to 90 days

LOOP AT lt_90days INTO ls_90days WHERE material = ls_stkstd-material AND plant = ls_stkstd-plant.

IF lv_qty_left <= ls_90days-quantity_in_base.

ls_output-material = ls_stkstd-material.

ls_output-plant = ls_stkstd-plant.

ls_output-stockquantity = ls_stkstd-stockquantity.

ls_output-qty_0to90days = lv_qty_left.

ls_output-unitprice = ls_90days-unitprice.

ls_output-value_0to90days = lv_qty_left * ls_90days-unitprice.

lv_qty_left = 0.

EXIT.

ELSE.

ls_output-material = ls_stkstd-material.

ls_output-plant = ls_stkstd-plant.

ls_output-stockquantity = ls_stkstd-stockquantity.

ls_output-qty_0to90days = ls_90days-quantity_in_base.

ls_output-unitprice = ls_90days-unitprice.

ls_output-value_0to90days = ls_output-qty_0to90days * ls_90days-unitprice.

lv_qty_left = lv_qty_left - ls_90days-quantity_in_base.

ENDIF.

ENDLOOP.

 

" Process 91 to 180 days

LOOP AT lt_180days INTO ls_180days WHERE material = ls_stkstd-material AND plant = ls_stkstd-plant.

IF lv_qty_left <= ls_180days-quantity_in_base.

ls_output-material = ls_stkstd-material.

ls_output-plant = ls_stkstd-plant.

ls_output-stockquantity = ls_stkstd-stockquantity.

ls_output-qty_90to180days = lv_qty_left.

ls_output-unitprice = ls_180days-unitprice.

ls_output-value_90to180days = lv_qty_left * ls_180days-unitprice.

lv_qty_left = 0.

EXIT.

ELSE.

ls_output-material = ls_stkstd-material.

ls_output-plant = ls_stkstd-plant.

ls_output-stockquantity = ls_stkstd-stockquantity.

ls_output-qty_90to180days = ls_180days-quantity_in_base.

ls_output-unitprice = ls_180days-unitprice.

ls_output-value_90to180days = ls_output-qty_90to180days * ls_180days-unitprice.

lv_qty_left = lv_qty_left - ls_180days-quantity_in_base.

ENDIF.

ENDLOOP.

 

" Process above 180 days

LOOP AT lt_above180 INTO ls_above180 WHERE material = ls_stkstd-material AND plant = ls_stkstd-plant.

IF lv_qty_left <= ls_above180-quantity_in_base.

ls_output-material = ls_stkstd-material.

ls_output-plant = ls_stkstd-plant.

ls_output-stockquantity = ls_stkstd-stockquantity.

ls_output-qty_above180days = lv_qty_left.

ls_output-unitprice = ls_above180-unitprice.

ls_output-value_above180days = lv_qty_left * ls_above180-unitprice.

lv_qty_left = 0.

EXIT.

ELSE.

ls_output-material = ls_stkstd-material.

ls_output-plant = ls_stkstd-plant.

ls_output-stockquantity = ls_stkstd-stockquantity.

ls_output-qty_above180days = ls_above180-quantity_in_base.

ls_output-unitprice = ls_above180-unitprice.

ls_output-value_above180days = ls_output-qty_above180days * ls_above180-unitprice.

lv_qty_left = lv_qty_left - ls_above180-quantity_in_base.

ENDIF.

ENDLOOP.

APPEND ls_output TO lt_output.

ENDLOOP.

** out->write( EXPORTING data = lt_output name = 'Table display' ).

IF io_request->is_total_numb_of_rec_requested( ).

io_response->set_total_number_of_records( lines( lt_output ) ).

ENDIF.

SORT lt_output ASCENDING BY material plant.

io_response->set_data( lt_output ).

 

ENDIF.

ENDCASE.

CATCH cx_rap_query_provider.

ENDTRY.

ENDMETHOD.

 

ENDCLASS.


Entity-

@EndUserText.label: 'Entity to define class for stock card report'

@ObjectModel.query.implementedBy: 'ABAP:ZSTOCKCARD'

define custom entity ZStockAgeEntity

{

 

key plant : abap.char(4);

key material : matnr;

stockquantity : abap.string;

unitprice : abap.string;

qty_0to90days : abap.string;

value_0to90days : abap.string;

qty_90to180days : abap.string;

value_90to180days : abap.string;

qty_above180days : abap.string;

value_above180days : abap.string;

 

}

Errors-
Short Dump Error
403 Error

Questins
1. can i consume it into a cds view or a table
2. How to pass data based on custom logic written in class to custom cds entity

3. implementing filter for point 2

4. Custom entity can be mapped to CDS view

 

 

@Andre_Fischer @yevgen_trukhin @julieplummer20 @krishnanunni_sudhakaranpi @kaitorsten_schipper

entry.title: Announcing the Water & Wastewater Leadership Day 2024: Brussels, Belgium, December 5th
entry.content:
​Following the tradition established at the SAP Executive Value Network for Water and Wastewater companies which have taken place during the last years in Europe and Latin America, this is an international knowledge- sharing oriented forum for those interested on innovative strategies and technologies to enhance water resilience and drive digital transformation in their companies.

Water companies across the world are struggling to resist and recover from enormous issues derived of the climate change together with others more known as infrastructure challenges. Such resilience requires the implementation of strategies and technologies that ensure a continuous and reliable supply of clean water, even in the face of disruptions at an affordable cost.

​In close collaboration with companies like FARYS, technology partners like ESRI and System Integrators, we planned an agenda bringing practical and inspirational use cases to introduce insightful discussions about the use of AI technologies, implementation of smart metering platforms, leveraging spatial data and enable consistent intelligent reporting in order to improve companies’ capacity to adapt into changing conditions and support sustainable development:

  • Intro / Welcome
  • The importance of sector collaboration:  Flanders collaborative experience for innovation in the Water Sector:  strategy and benefits
  • Developing an AI strategy in a public company
  • Smart Water Platform: 
    • Use cases from business perspective
    • Leveraging data intelligence beyond smart metering: Water Balance, energy management and AI- driven cases

Lunch break

  • Suez test and analytics of digital water meters
  • ESRI on HANA DB:  advantages and possibilities comibining data from SAP S/4HANA
  • Leveraging spatial data to build strategic asset management 

​For those interested to join us at the SAP Belgium offices in Brussels and take part in our discussions, we have set up a registration website where you can register for the event and get the latest updates:  https://events.sap.com/evn-water-2024/en/home 

​We are looking forward to meeting you in Belgium for an exciting day!

entry.title: Is there option to block personal devices from logging into SAP
entry.content:
Is there option block personal devices from logging into SAP.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Is there option to block personal devices from loggin...
entry.content:
This can be achieved by using Certificate-Based Logon.

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_BUSINESS_BYDESIGN/2754875d2d2a403f95e58a41a9c7d6de/9af7170c8661101482cd8d8dce5e5949.html?locale=en-US

3351213 - How to Download and Setup Certificate-Based Logon
https://me.sap.com/notes/3351213

Alternatively Single Sign On can provide a similar effect.

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/single-sign-on-sso-with-sap-business-bydesign/ba-p/13337088

entry.title: Re: Industry Sector field in Product Master in S4HANA Pub...
entry.content:
Hello @bavinash1 

The Industry Sector field is not available in the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, unlike in the On-Premises or Private Cloud versions. To maintain industry-related details in the Public Edition, you can utilize the Material Group field as an alternative.

Best Regards

Vivek Savant

entry.title: Re: Public Dimension Table Import Job Error
entry.content:
In our case we were facing the issue when loading an empty Dimension the first time. We got the error, but when checking the Dimension Table we saw that there was data loaded. I tried then to change something and when saving i got the message that the Line "Not in hierarchy" is missing and should be added manually.

After adding the line and saving the changes the refresh succeeded.

entry.title: Re: RAP: VH filter on child lvl based on value from parent entity
entry.content: I have the same question @Andre_Fischer, could you please help? If it is really possible. What I have noticed that  filter started working once fields on the page are filled, so problem which I see here is that view does know nothing about fields on the header level, even if I referenced header fields in projection view

entry.title: Re: custom splash screen for mdk branded client
entry.content: hello, any updates on this? is there an online example of how to achive this?

entry.title: Re: Fortalecendo a Comunidade SAP no Sul do Brasil com o SAP Inside Track Curitiba 2024
entry.content:
Essa segunda edição em Curitiba realmente foi sensacional!
#sitcwb2024

entry.title: Re: IPS Requirement to Activate People Analytics
entry.content: Hello Jay,

entry.title: Re: Path Variables in Integration Flow
entry.content:
Hi Anji,

Please try to pass the path variables over the query parameters URL.
https://api.ariba.com/viewTemplates?viewTemplateName=Test_Re&updatedDateFrom=2024-10-05T20:30:45Z&updatedDateTo=2024-12-05T20:30:45Z

Thanks & Regards,

Kiran

entry.title: Re: IF_EX_ME_PROCESS_REQ_CUST~PROCESS_ITEM NOT getting updated from EBAN
entry.content: You need to restart ME52N to make it re-read the database changes.

entry.title: Getting Tax item missing for tax code error from BAPI_ACC_DOCUMENT_POST.
entry.content: The issue is because we are sending zero tax, so no BSET internal table is filling and we are getting this standard error. Any idea on this.

entry.title: Re: IPS Requirement to Activate People Analytics
entry.content: Hello Jay, I confirm that in the end we had activate IPS to be able to enable stories

entry.title: Where can I start learning how to configure SAP Intelligent Clinical Supply Management?
entry.content:
I recommend to access our Configuring SAP Intelligent Clinical Supply Management learning journey.

Overview
This course guides you through the intricate landscape of SAP Intelligent Clinical Supply Management. This advanced solution is designed to streamline and simplify the management of clinical supplies in the pharmaceutical and life sciences industries. In this course, you will explore the architecture of SAP Intelligent Clinical Supply Management, delve into its product components, master data setup, and configuration possibilities. You will also gain insights into integration aspects with other solutions, empowering you with the knowledge needed to optimize the clinical supply chain efficiently.

Learning objectives

  • Explain the SAP Intelligent Clinical Supply Management architecture and product components.
  • Describe the integration aspects of SAP Intelligent Clinical Supply Management with other solutions.
  • Set up and manage master data, including the creation of the three main material types.
  • Analyze and apply different configuration possibilities within SAP Intelligent Clinical Supply Management to meet specific business needs.

Prerequisites

  • Introducing SAP Intelligent Clinical Supply Management

Pass all the quizzes and receive a digital badge

Please ask a question related to the digital learning Journey in the Q&A area. 

Our SAP Learning Experts will get back to you as soon as possible! We are here to support you. 

I appreciate your feedback and we will make sure to continue sharing interesting topics.

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Re: Graphic colors get distored after trying to remove grey background and converting to BMP
entry.content: Old technology with limits explained by SAP (BMP with 256 colors, etc.) Try asking questions in other forums concerning Gimp to obtain the best image possible.

entry.title: Re: Welcome to the beginner corner!
entry.content:
@David

Hello,

My name is Asim. I am looking to change careers into BTP. Some job listings ask for experience in SAP. I never used the software before - which online learning courses/certifications would be the best to start?

Thank you!

entry.title: Real User Monitoring in CALM operations. Monitor the right system
entry.content:
we have tried to set up The real User Monitoring, but we get No data, And I believe it is because the system monitored is our SAP BTP cloud foundry environment.

 

I want of course to monitor our S/4 production system.

I understand that I can select systems through System landscape settings but do not understand why this BTP system was set up initially, can I just change? what would that mean for other CALM operations? 

Appreciate all help here. Can I just change system to monitor by changing system Lanscape settings without it having any other implications?

entry.title: Re: Integration of Plant Maintenance(PM) with Extended warehouse management (EWM) in S/4HANA 2021 Re
entry.content: Good Info

entry.title: Re: Invitation to Beta program for successor to SAP GUI f...
entry.content:
Hi Frank,

we are SAP ISV with own support component XX-PART-XFT and developing an add-on for R/3 and S/4.

We want to be sure that all our development is working fine with 8.10 - especially with the 64Bit version, which are more and more used by our customers.

Our special interest is in nested controls, especial with HTML5 control, Inplace viewing and working on Documents and Calcualtion Sheets, Drag and Drop from outside into SAPGUI.

best regards
Ulrich

entry.title: Re: SAP CPI
entry.content:
The header that includes the directory for the source file would be "CamelFileName" but it also includes the value of the file itself which can be accessed via header "CamelFileNameOnly".  That information would only be relevant for the source because no value would be present for the target since it would reference the same headers or any specific configuration that you provide.

 

Regards,

Ryan Crosby

entry.title: SAC Column Chart - Set Layered Bars Front/Back via Code
entry.content:
Hi,

if I add/remove Measure in a Column Chart, the setting Show As - Layered Bars - Front/Back will be removed.

Is it possible to set this via Code?

thx

entry.title: Re: Architecting Email Approval without My Inbox for SAP Build Process Automation Workflows: Part 1
entry.content:
Hi @mohit_bansal3,

Thank you for the follow-up.  If the solution includes CAP services as mentioned, it would be great to include an SAP BTP Solution Diagram in your post to help illustrate how all the components fit together.

Regarding my question on email validation and security, after reading blog #3, I understand that the sender’s email address is validated against the approvers linked to the workflow instance.  However, this approach doesn’t fully address the risk of email spoofing.  Could you share your thoughts on mitigating this risk in your solution?

Regards,
Mustafa.

entry.title: Re: Cannot create a single file installer in SAP Installa...
entry.content: Hi Jude, Yes, this file can be executed on any workstations to install my early created package.

entry.title: Question About Associating Attributes Across Dimensions in SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
I am importing an Excel file into SAP Analytics Cloud and have a question about whether my approach will work.

Here’s the situation: I have two dimensions, "Dep" and "Rec," which contain the following data:

  • Dep: DepA, DepB
  • Rec: Rec1, Rec2

I’m trying to ensure that the attributes of my "Account" dimension and the "Value" measure are associated with both "Rec" and "Dep." However, the attributes of the "Account" dimension have the same names but are associated with different values.

Does anyone know if this setup will work or how I might need to adjust it? Any guidance would be greatly appreciated!

entry.title: Re: Graphic colors get distored after trying to remove grey background and converting to BMP
entry.content:
Thanks, I honestly wasn't sure whether to focus on SAP or on any other application to improve the image. I will ask somewhere else.
(But of course, should there be anyone else who has dealt with this, I'd love to hear your input)

entry.title: Re: Architecture Decisions for Supplier Payment Collaboration
entry.content: When evaluating the SAP Business Network (SBN) and especially SAP Business Network for Supply Chain Collaboration it is imperative to understand how the business model towards the suppliers are expressed. This is so because the SBN for SCC is based on the business model of Procurement of Service, if your client is working from any other business model like from a manufacturing business model then the SBN for SCC may not be an appropriate solution for them.

entry.title: Re: How to Transport G/L Accounts between two systems?
entry.content:
Hello,

Now you can actually use transaction OBY9 to transport Chart of Accounts and Company Code ralated data of general ledger accounts.

Regards

entry.title: Re: Why is Hungarian Notation Harmful?
entry.content:
I have avoided using that terrible notation for several years, but there are a couple of exceptions.  I use c_ for constants (read-only awareness), t_ for tables so I can distinguish lists from normal values or structured values, and there are s_ and p_ for select options and parameters in report screens.  Outside of that I provide meaningful names for what the content would represent within the flow of the program.

 

Regards,

Ryan Crosby

entry.title: Email with Body - MDK
entry.content:
Hi guys,

Is it possible to implement a button that opens the email app with a email passing it and a body in a MDK app?

Greetings and thanks for the response!! 😄

entry.title: Re: Start lean with RAP (Restful ABAP programming model) #1
entry.content: @dan_sul Hi Daniel, interesting - I suppose you are talking about the preview that you open from Service Binding in ADT - so kind of generated Fiori Elements frontend? I would suggest you try to test your oData service through GW Client transaction. If you look at this older blog https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/sap-gateway-deep-insert-end-to-end-scenario/ba-p/13362494 you can follow it from the part where they do GET with expand and use the same payload for POST (again in GW Client). If you put breakpoints in your behavior implementation create and save methods, it should stop there. I personally used this lean RAP approach in multiple apps with odata V2 + freestyle UI5 frontend (two-way binding of views directly to oDataModel and submitChanges to trigger the deep insert oData call)  and it worked with no issues.

entry.title: Re: Error Message no. CJ055 'PEP element is already imput...
entry.content:
Hi borja82

 
Please create an OSS incident for this issue and SAP support will have a look.
Regards,
Javier del Peso

entry.title: Tcode/Fiori apps for checking approval status
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

Is there any tcode or fiori apps where user can check condition contract number wise release status or condition contract number wise approval status?

Thanks,

Arindam Sur

entry.title: Re: Start lean with RAP (Restful ABAP programming model) #1
entry.content: @ralphswurld Hi Ralph, you wouldn't call BAPI_TRANSACTION_COMMIT from the RAP behavior implementation class at all. RAP framework will trigger the COMMIT WORK for you automatically (happens after the SAVE method).

entry.title: Re: Deleting Blog Post
entry.content:
Hello @Cornelia 

I don't think you can delete a published blog post by yourself. That is due to SAP community rules on data retention. You can either:

  • remove the content of the post or
  • ask a moderator to delete it.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: IBP inbound data integration for medium term demand planning process
entry.content:
Hello,

suppose business needs to run statistical demand planning process (medium-long term) in IBP once a month, for example. This means no real time nor frequent data integration is needed. Therefore, data needed in IBP (in particular, for 11V best practice) would be provided via file with Data integration jobs app. Forecast must be then integrated to S/4 HANA via outbound integration (4NO best practice).

Is the integration method via file (Data integration jobs) suitable to run this business process / are there businesses running in IBP without data integration from S/4 to IBP (3OF best practice) ? What could be the drawbacks of not activating inbound integration from S/4 to IBP ?

Many thanks for your support and best regards.

Giuseppe

entry.title: Re: Error in char on object page: [50017] - Invalid data binding
entry.content:
I stumbled on same errorI have attached my annotations file, can you please help me in correcting the file please.

<edmx:Edmx xmlns:edmx="http://docs.oasis-open.org/odata/ns/edmx" Version="4.0">
    <edmx:Reference Uri="https://sap.github.io/odata-vocabularies/vocabularies/Analytics.xml">
        <edmx:Include Namespace="com.sap.vocabularies.Analytics.v1" Alias="Analytics" />
    </edmx:Reference>
    <edmx:Reference Uri="https://sap.github.io/odata-vocabularies/vocabularies/UI.xml">
        <edmx:Include Namespace="com.sap.vocabularies.UI.v1" Alias="UI" />
    </edmx:Reference>
    <edmx:Reference Uri="/sap/opu/odata4/sap/zsb_so/srvd/sap/zsd_so_vbak/0001/$metadata">
        <edmx:Include Namespace="com.sap.gateway.srvd.zsd_so_vbak.v0001" Alias="SAP__self" />
    </edmx:Reference>

    <edmx:Reference Uri="/sap/opu/odata/IWFND/CATALOGSERVICE;v=2/Vocabularies(TechnicalName='%2FIWBEP%2FVOC_AGGREGATION',Version='0001',SAP__Origin='LOCAL')/$value">
        <edmx:Include Namespace="Org.OData.Aggregation.V1" Alias="SAP__aggregation" />
    </edmx:Reference>
    <edmx:DataServices>
        <Schema xmlns="http://docs.oasis-open.org/odata/ns/edm" Namespace="local">
            <Annotations Target="SAP__self.HeaderType">
                <Annotation Term="SAP__aggregation.ApplySupported">
                    <Record Type="SAP__aggregation.ApplySupportedType">
                        <PropertyValue Property="Rollup" EnumMember="SAP__aggregation.RollupType/None" />
                        <PropertyValue Property="Transformations">
                            <Collection>
                                <String>filter</String>
                                <String>identity</String>
                                <String>orderby</String>
                                <String>skip</String>
                                <String>top</String>
                                <String>groupby</String>
                                <String>aggregate</String>
                                <String>concat</String>
                            </Collection>
                        </PropertyValue>
                        <PropertyValue Property="GroupableProperties">
                            <Collection>
                                <PropertyPath>SalesOrder</PropertyPath>
                                <PropertyPath>SoldToParty</PropertyPath>
                                <PropertyPath>TransactionCurrency</PropertyPath>
                                <PropertyPath>CreationDate</PropertyPath>
                                <PropertyPath>SalesOrderType</PropertyPath>
                            </Collection>
                        </PropertyValue>
                        <PropertyValue Property="PropertyRestrictions" Bool="true"/>                        
                        <PropertyValue Property="AggregatableProperties">
                            <Collection>
                                <Record Type="SAP__aggregation.AggregatablePropertyType">
                                    <PropertyValue Property="Property" PropertyPath="TotalNetAmount" />
                                    <PropertyValue Property="RecommendedAggregationMethod" String="average" />
                                </Record>
                                <Record Type="SAP__aggregation.AggregatablePropertyType">
                                    <PropertyValue Property="Property" PropertyPath="differentOrderType" />
                            <PropertyValue Property="RecommendedAggregationMethod" String="countdistinct" />                                
                                </Record>
                            </Collection>
                        </PropertyValue>
                    </Record>
                </Annotation>

                <Annotation Term="Analytics.AggregatedProperty" Qualifier="totalAmount">
                    <Record Type="Analytics.AggregatedPropertyType">
                        <PropertyValue Property="Name" String="totalAmount" />
                        <PropertyValue Property="AggregatableProperty" PropertyPath="TotalNetAmount" />
                        <PropertyValue Property="AggregationMethod" String="average" />
                    </Record>
                </Annotation>
                <Annotation Term="UI.Chart" Qualifier="alpChart">
                    <Record Type="UI.ChartDefinitionType">
                        <PropertyValue Property="Description" String="Amount" />
                        <PropertyValue Property="Title" String="Amount In Order Type" />
                        <PropertyValue Property="ChartType" EnumMember="UI.ChartType/Column" />
                        <PropertyValue Property="DimensionAttributes">
                            <Collection>
                                <Record Type="UI.ChartDimensionAttributeType">
                                    <PropertyValue Property="Dimension" PropertyPath="SalesOrderType" />
                                    <PropertyValue Property="Role" EnumMember="UI.ChartDimensionRoleType/Series" />
                                </Record>
                                <Record Type="UI.ChartDimensionAttributeType">
                                    <PropertyValue Property="Dimension" PropertyPath="SalesOrder" />
                                    <PropertyValue Property="Role" EnumMember="UI.ChartDimensionRoleType/Category" />
                                </Record>
                            </Collection>
                        </PropertyValue>

                        <PropertyValue Property="Dimensions">
                            <Collection>
                                <PropertyPath>SalesOrderType</PropertyPath>
                                <PropertyPath>SalesOrder</PropertyPath>
                            </Collection>
                        </PropertyValue>
                        <PropertyValue Property="DynamicMeasures">
                            <Collection>
                                <AnnotationPath>@analytics.AggregatedProperty#totalAmount</AnnotationPath>
                            </Collection>
                        </PropertyValue>


                        <PropertyValue Property="MeasureAttributes">
                            <Collection>
                                <Record Type="UI.ChartMeasureAttributeType">
                                    <PropertyValue Property="DynamicMeasure" AnnotationPath="@Analytics.AggregatedProperty#totalAmount" />
                                    <PropertyValue Property="Role" EnumMember="UI.ChartMeasureRoleType/Axis1" />
                                </Record>
                            </Collection>
                        </PropertyValue>
                    </Record>
                </Annotation>
            </Annotations>
            <Annotations Target="SAP__self.Container/Header">
                <Annotation Term="SAP__aggregation.ApplySupported">
                    <Record Type="SAP__aggregation.ApplySupportedType">
                        <PropertyValue Property="Rollup" EnumMember="SAP__aggregation.RollupType/None" />
                        <PropertyValue Property="Transformations">
                            <Collection>
                                <String>filter</String>
                                <String>identity</String>
                                <String>orderby</String>
                                <String>skip</String>
                                <String>top</String>
                                <String>groupby</String>
                                <String>aggregate</String>
                                <String>concat</String>
                            </Collection>
                        </PropertyValue>
                        <PropertyValue Property="GroupableProperties">
                            <Collection>
                                <PropertyPath>SalesOrder</PropertyPath>
                                <PropertyPath>SoldToParty</PropertyPath>
                                <PropertyPath>TransactionCurrency</PropertyPath>
                                <PropertyPath>CreationDate</PropertyPath>
                                <PropertyPath>SalesOrderType</PropertyPath>
                            </Collection>
                        </PropertyValue>
                    </Record>
                </Annotation>
            </Annotations>
        </Schema>
    </edmx:DataServices>
</edmx:Edmx>

entry.title: Re: Graphic colors get distored after trying to remove grey background and converting to BMP
entry.content:
Reference: KBA 1897125 - Color graphic or logo has a grey background when printed

Tools: How to convert bmp to 256 color?

entry.title: Re: Start lean with RAP (Restful ABAP programming model) #1
entry.content: @RishabhAgarwal Hi Rishabh, interesting I haven't encountered this issue myself. Which S/4 HANA version are you working on? Is it Public or Private Cloud / On Premise? Or is it BTP ABAP? I know RAP would throw the same dump if the BAPI would have COMMIT WORK inside but never got this issue with AUTHORITY-CHECK statement (I am on S/4 2023 FPS1 on prem). In general to overcome these illegal statements you can call the BAPI with DESTINATION 'NONE' and then it should work.

entry.title: Re: S/4HANA Group Reporting Historical Data Accelerator & How to Deploy in a Customer Landscape
entry.content:
Hi,

I am looking into using this.

The ConsolidationVersion keep giving me the error that I am suppose to select a different version.

Are there something special consideration for Version we need to be aware of?

entry.title: Re: Tcode/Fiori apps for checking approval status
entry.content: I think you might find your answer in using Fiori App F0842A

entry.title: Re: Using Integration Center and/or Intelligent Services Centre to update Background Elements or MDF
entry.content:
Hi @karenperez,

Thanks for this great blog it's incredibly informative, your expertise could really help me solve my problem.

I am trying to Sync data from Job classification into position as i need pay structures(Pay scale Area, Group, Levels) changes in job classification to be synchronized into positions with new record with the same date of changes in job classification, is it applicable by integration center? 

When I followed the steps given I got this error:

Position: Batch upsert failed as no record was successfully upserted.

Thank you,
Omima Mostafa.

entry.title: EWM Warehouse monitor hotspot issue
entry.content:
Hi ,

I met the issue about ewm hotspot issue as screen shot. and one client have hotspot,another didnt have hotspot.

who know what is the issue.and other collegues have hotspots.

entry.title: How to trigger IDOC based on status change on Material (integration question)
entry.content:
Hello,

I'd like to trigger an integration for Material sync in S4HANA cloud edition but only for cases when Material reaches status 71 or 72. When this happens, I'd like to send an IDOC to my integration platform.

Could you guys please let me know what are my options to do this a which option is the best? I believe I'd have to setup some sort of custom trigger in Material master?

Thank you!

Petr

entry.title: Re: Advanced Intercompany Stock Transfer in SAP S/4HANA
entry.content:
hello 

please, any idea how could I change movement type for GI in proces IntercompanyStockTransfer in PUBLIC cloud ? instead of 643 I would need 645- I have to do GR generated by GI.

 

thanks

 

Martin

entry.title: Re: DRFOUT Error
entry.content: Hi - I do not see a screen shot; would you please check?

entry.title: Re: Content 'Not mobile accessible' for non-mobiles (Tabl...
entry.content: Assuming the user already registered their mobile device via the qr code to access any lms content, the content object must be enabled for mobile access in the launch method configuration (box checked) or at the time of upload of the content package.

entry.title: SuccessFactors Agile Implementation using Cloud ALM
entry.content:
Hi Team,

 Has anyone implemented SuccessFactors the Agile way using Cloud ALM. If yes could please share your experience and help us understand how to do it. We have the below queries,

  1. If we use Cloud ALM during fit to standard workshops and capture requirements in ALM, at what point we will be doing configuration workbook discussion and updating the same.
  2. Please share any sample items which are tagged as requirement, User Stories and Tasks with respect to Employee Central module.
  3. Do we have templates to capture detailed requirements for custom extension object like MDF and Integrations requirement document using CPI.
  4. Cloud ALM has the SuccessFactors modules in the scope, how to capture integration requirements or reporting requirements.
